title: Back To The Future Sweet Suites
Silver Cloud Hotel - Seattle Lake Union
description: Informal hotel featuring breakfast, Wi-Fi access & parking, plus a gym & a business center.
hotelDescription:
Located 2 blocks from I-5 and overlooking Lake Union, this relaxed hotel is 2 miles from the observation deck at the Space Needle.
 Understated rooms feature flat-screen TVs and Wi-Fi, as well as minifridges, microwaves and coffeemakers. Suites add sitting areas with pull-out sofas. Upgraded rooms have lake views and/or fireplaces. A few offer wet bars. Some come with in-room whirlpool tubs.
 Amenities include breakfast, parking and laundry facilities. There's also an exercise room and a business center.

title: Creators' Kitchen as Seen on TikTok
Courtyard by Marriott Seattle Downtown/Lake Union
description: Warm quarters, some with lake views, in a casual hotel offering a gym, dining & free WiFi.
hotelDescription:
Overlooking Lake Union, this casual hotel in the Westlake district is 1 mile from both the Space Needle and Pike Place Market, as well as the Seattle Center monorail station.
 Warm rooms offer free WiFi, desks, flat-screen TVs, minifridges and coffeemakers. Upgraded rooms come with city or lake views. Suites add separate living areas.
 Amenities consist of a bistro-style restaurant serving breakfast, dinner and Starbucks coffee, along with a 24/7 exercise room. There's a business center and meeting space. Parking is offered for a fee.

title: Residence Inn by Marriott Seattle Downtown/Lake Union
description: Modest suites with full kitchens in a relaxed hotel with a pool, plus free WiFi & hot breakfast.
hotelDescription:
A 3-minute walk from the shores of Lake Union and 1.1 miles from the Space Needle and Seattle Center, this laid-back, extended-stay hotel is 1.9 miles from the Seattle Art Museum.
 The modest suites range from studios to 2-bedrooms. All feature fully-equipped kitchens, dining tables and sitting areas with pull-out sofas, as well as free WiFi and flat-screen TVs. Some have private balconies with lake views.
 Freebies include hot breakfast and coffee in the lobby. Other amenities include a casual restaurant, an indoor pool and a hot tub, in addition to a business center and a fitness room. Parking is extra.
